description: Post-import fix registry. Every manual fix to content or blocks after import must be logged here. Pending fixes must be incorporated into parsers/transformers before reimport.

rules.beforeReimport: All entries with status 'pending' must be incorporated into the relevant parser or transformer before running any import.
rules.afterFix: Every manual fix must create a new entry with status 'pending'.
rules.afterIncorporation: Change status to 'incorporated' and add 'incorporatedDate' and 'incorporatedIn' fields.

fixes.parser: parsers/hero.js, parsers/cards.js, parsers/columns.js, parsers/cards-leader.js, parsers/quote.js, parsers/embed.js, parsers/accordion.js, parsers/hero-profile.js
fixes.description: Parsers create new DOM elements for block tables but do not carry analytics data-* attributes from source elements. Each parser must extract data-cmp-data-layer, data-track, and data-analytics from source elements and attach standardized data-analytics-* attributes to block wrapper or cell elements.
fixes.rootCause: parser
fixes.fixDetails: Created parsers/utils/analytics.js with extractAnalytics() and applyAnalytics() helpers. Added import and applyAnalytics() call to all 8 parsers. Updated transformers/abbvie-cleanup.js to standardize rather than strip analytics attributes.

fixes.description: 6 out of 8 images on community-of-science have empty alt text. The columns parser extracts images but does not always find the alt attribute from the source AEM image component (.cmp-image img[alt]).
fixes.rootCause: parser
fixes.fixDetails: Added alt text extraction in columns.js: checks img.alt first, then .cmp-image title/data-title, then aria-label on container. Result: community-of-science went from 6 empty alt to 0 empty alt.

fixes.description: Embed block missing overlay text (title, description, watch button). The cleanup transformer removed .cmp-video__text-content-outside before the embed parser could extract overlay text. Result: embed rendered with simple play button instead of rich overlay with title/desc/watch button.
fixes.rootCause: transformer execution order
fixes.fixDetails: 1) Updated transformers/abbvie-cleanup.js to stash overlay title, description, and watch button text as data attributes (data-overlay-title, data-overlay-desc, data-overlay-btn) BEFORE removing video UI elements. 2) Updated parsers/embed.js to read stashed data attributes and emit h2 (title), p (description), and link text in block HTML. 3) Added field comments (field:embed_title, field:embed_description, field:embed_buttonLabel, field:embed_uri) for all model fields to ensure xwalk EDS serving preserves content.

fixes.description: Quote block md2jcr conversion failed. Parser output had wrong field names ('attribution' instead of 'attributionName'/'attributionTitle'), wrong structure (2 rows with combined name+title instead of 8 separate rows matching model), and background image leaked as section default content instead of being in backgroundImage field.
fixes.rootCause: parser
fixes.fixDetails: 1) Changed from 2 rows (quotation + attribution) to 8 rows matching component model field order: quoteType, quotation, attributionName, attributionTitle, attributionImage, quoteFragment, backgroundImage, backgroundImageAlt. 2) Each field gets its own row with correct field comment (field:quoteType, field:attributionName, etc). 3) Background image now extracted from parent .container and placed in backgroundImage row instead of leaking as section default content. 4) Empty rows preserved for attributionImage and quoteFragment (required for positional mapping).

fixes.description: Missing images on science-hub page: hero bg image, 4 story card images, explore section image, CTA image. Hero parser searched for <picture> but AbbVie uses img.cmp-container__bg-image. Cards parser missed images due to lazy loading (data-cmp-src) and missing col-with-3 selector. Columns parser explore section selector used child combinator but grid was nested 2 levels deep.
fixes.rootCause: parser selectors + lazy loading
fixes.fixDetails: 1) hero.js: Added img.cmp-container__bg-image as primary selector, handle standalone not just , added data-cmp-src fallback. 2) cards.js: Added .cmp-header__text for titles, .cmp-button for CTAs, .cmp-image__image for images, col-with-3 to grid selectors, data-cmp-src fallback for lazy images, added resolveLazyImages() for .cmp-image[data-cmp-src] containers. 3) import-science-page.js: Changed explore selector from child (>) to descendant combinator. 4) transformers/abbvie-cleanup.js: Added global lazy-load resolution (data-cmp-src → src) in beforeTransform phase for all img and .cmp-image elements.

fixes.description: Hero image missing after import. The science-hub template had TWO hero block instances: the large-radius background container AND the overlap-predecessor text container. When the hero parser ran on instance #1 (image container), it replaced it with an empty hero block. By the time instance #2 (text container) ran, the image container was gone, so previousElementSibling found nothing.
fixes.rootCause: duplicate block instance in template config
fixes.fixDetails: Removed the large-radius container from hero block instances in both import-science-hub.js and page-templates.json. The hero parser only needs the overlap-predecessor element — it already finds the image from previousElementSibling.

fixes.description:
Package creation failed with 'Unescaped < not allowed in attributes values'. data-cmp-data-layer attributes survived the afterTransform cleanup and contained unescaped

tags and bare & in R&D text.
fixes.rootCause: cleanup timing — afterTransform removal was ineffective
fixes.fixDetails: Added data-cmp-data-layer stripping to beforeTransform phase (step 10) in abbvie-cleanup.js. Extracts analytics data first, then removes the attribute early before any parser or serializer can preserve it.

fixes.description: Explore our science section missing left-column image (Microscope image of cells). The columns parser produced an empty first div because the AEM source uses lazy-loaded Scene7 images that are not available during headless extraction.
fixes.rootCause: parser - lazy-loaded Scene7 image not extracted
fixes.fixDetails: 1) Root cause fixed: transformers/abbvie-cleanup.js now resolves data-cmp-src → src in beforeTransform for all img and .cmp-image elements. 2) parsers/columns.js added resolveLazyImages() safety net. 3) Manual content fix preserved: scene7 URL in science.plain.html.

fixes.description: CTA section 'Where bold science meets real-world results' missing left-column image (Cambridge Scientists) and section-metadata for highlight background. The columns parser produced an empty first div because the AEM source uses lazy-loaded Scene7 images. Section-metadata with style 'highlight' was not generated by the import.
fixes.rootCause: parser - lazy-loaded Scene7 image not extracted, missing section-metadata
fixes.fixDetails: 1) Root cause fixed: transformers/abbvie-cleanup.js now resolves data-cmp-src → src in beforeTransform. 2) CTA section restructured as default content within FAQ section (section-9 in template), no longer separate columns block. 3) page-templates.json section-9 updated to 'FAQ + CTA Band' with CTA default content selectors. 4) CSS styling for CTA band added to styles.css (full-bleed light blue bg, 2-column grid, outlined button). 5) Manual content fix: Cambridge Scientists scene7 URL in science.plain.html.

fixes.description: All 4 story cards ('The stories behind our science' section) missing images. The cards parser produced empty image divs because the AEM source uses lazy-loaded Scene7 images with data-cmp-src attributes on the .cmp-image container div, not on the img elements.
fixes.rootCause: parser - lazy-loaded Scene7 images via data-cmp-src on container div not extracted
fixes.fixDetails: 1) Root cause fixed: transformers/abbvie-cleanup.js now resolves data-cmp-src → src on .cmp-image[data-cmp-src] containers in beforeTransform. 2) parsers/cards.js added resolveLazyImages() that handles .cmp-image[data-cmp-src] container pattern — creates img element from container's data-cmp-src if no img exists. 3) Manual content fix preserved: 4 scene7 URLs in science.plain.html.

fixes.description: PRIORITIES label above Core Focus Areas h4 was removed by cleanup transformer. The .cmp-header__text removal in beforeTransform indiscriminately deleted all header text elements including the meaningful 'PRIORITIES' eyebrow label.
fixes.rootCause: transformer - over-aggressive removal of .cmp-header__text
fixes.fixDetails:
Updated transformers/abbvie-cleanup.js to selectively preserve .cmp-header__text elements with text 'PRIORITIES' — converts them to

PRIORITIES

instead of removing. Other .cmp-header__text elements (navigation tab headers) are still removed.

fixes.description: FAQ accordion rendered full-width (1330px) instead of centered ~768px. The live site uses cmp-accordion-large align-center which maps to a 7/12 column grid layout. The EDS accordion block had no size class applied, defaulting to grid-column: 1 / -1.
fixes.rootCause: CSS - missing grid-column constraint for standalone FAQ accordion sections
fixes.fixDetails: Added CSS rules in blocks/accordion/accordion.css: 1) .section.accordion-container:not(.navy, .cards-container, .embed-container) .accordion { grid-column: 3 / span 7 } for 7/12 centered layout. 2) Question font-size updated from 26px to 32px, font-weight from 500 to 650 to match live site. 3) FAQ section heading styled: 48px centered h2 with letter-spacing -0.96px.

fixes.description: CTA band 'Where bold science meets real-world results' (below FAQ accordion) missing styling: no light blue background, no 2-column layout, wrong button style (filled+rounded instead of outlined+square).
fixes.rootCause: CSS - no styling existed for CTA default content after accordion block
fixes.fixDetails: Added ~80 lines of CSS in styles/styles.css: 1) Full-bleed light blue background rgb(241,243,255) with negative margins. 2) Desktop 2-column grid (5fr 5fr, 8rem gap) with image spanning left column. 3) H2 styled as 48px/800 weight. 4) Outlined button: transparent bg, 1px solid rgb(0,102,245) border, border-radius: 0, uppercase 14px. 5) Responsive breakpoints for mobile/tablet/desktop.

fixes.description: CTA image had broken blob: URL (blob:https://www.abbvie.com/f921db4d-...) that doesn't work outside the browser session. Image was not visible in local preview.
fixes.rootCause: content - blob: URL captured from browser session instead of Scene7 source URL
fixes.fixDetails: Replaced blob:https://www.abbvie.com/f921db4d-161f-4934-a67a-0da182d112a2 with https://abbvie.scene7.com/is/image/abbviecorp/Cambridge%20Scientists in content/science.plain.html. Also fixed alt text from 'none' to 'Cambridge Scientists'.

fixes.description: Footer columns section has three issues: 1) Social media SVG icons rendering at ~267px (should be 24px) due to columns img { width: 100% }. 2) 'No results found / Change your search criteria' artifact text from AEM search component not removed. 3) AbbVie logo uses blob: URL that doesn't load outside browser session.
fixes.rootCause: CSS - no footer-specific column styling; content - blob URL and search artifacts
fixes.fixDetails: 1) Added ~120 lines of footer-specific CSS to styles/abbvie/blocks/columns/columns.css (the brand-specific override, NOT the base blocks/columns/columns.css): dark navy background override for highlight section, social icon sizing (24px with !important to override columns img 100%), hide 'No results found' with ul+p display:none !important, footer 4-col flex grid layout, white text, legal text styling at 70% opacity, disabled uppercase first-p rule for footer context. 2) Replaced blob:https://www.abbvie.com/b0fd21d2-... with https://abbvie.scene7.com/is/content/abbviecorp/abbvie-logo-header in content/science.plain.html. 3) Added CSS filter: brightness(0) invert(1) to make both logo and social media SVG icons white on dark background. 4) Override columns ul margin-top:60 at desktop breakpoint for footer context.

fixes.description:
Package creation failed with 'Unescaped < not allowed in attributes values'. Systematic md2jcr issues across accordion blocks: 1) item_0 accordion items had Lorem Ipsum placeholder with literal

tags (unescaped). 2) Button linkText had bare & in 'R&D'. 3) Accordion block classes_alignment and classes_desktopWidth had FAQ content leaked into wrong model fields.
fixes.rootCause: md2jcr conversion - first accordion item always gets placeholder text with unescaped HTML; button linkText ampersand not escaped; accordion FAQ summary/link values leak into classes_alignment and classes_desktopWidth model fields
fixes.fixDetails: Fixed in both science.xml and science/our-people.xml: 1) Replaced item_0 Lorem Ipsum with actual FAQ content (properly XML-escaped). 2) Fixed all bare & in R&D linkText attributes to &. 3) Removed mismatched classes_alignment (had URL) and classes_desktopWidth (had FAQ question) from accordion blocks. 4) Validated all 6 XML files pass XML well-formedness check.

fixes.description: Section metadata (classes_container, background) not carried into JCR XML. All section elements in all XML files were missing their style and background attributes from section-metadata blocks.
fixes.rootCause: md2jcr conversion does not map section-metadata key-value pairs to section element attributes. The section-metadata block content (style, background) is ignored during conversion.
fixes.fixDetails: Manually added section attributes to all XML files: science.xml (section=navy-overlap, section_2=navy+background, section_5=explore-tenacity, section_8=highlight), our-people.xml (section=navy-overlap, section_2=dark, section_4=navy), index.xml (section_3=highlight). All 6 XML files validated.

fixes.description: Scene7 image alt text lost during EDS backend processing. EDS converts external to links; when link text is the URL itself (not the original alt), resolveImageReference sets img.alt to the URL. Affected 6 card images on science page.
fixes.rootCause: scripts.js resolveImageReference - link.textContent used as alt even when it's a URL
fixes.fixDetails: Updated resolveImageReference in scripts/scripts.js to detect when link text is a URL (starts with http) and extract a human-readable alt from the URL pathname instead. Falls back to empty string if URL parsing fails.

fixes.description: Cards without images (stats cards) get two cards-card-body divs instead of cards-card-image + cards-card-body. Empty image placeholder divs (containing only <!-- field:image --> comment) have no picture/img element, so cards.js classifies them as body instead of image.
fixes.rootCause: blocks/cards/cards.js - empty first div not recognized as image placeholder
fixes.fixDetails:
Added index parameter to forEach callback in cards.js. When index === 0 and div has no text content (empty image placeholder, e.g. wrapped in

), classify as cards-card-image instead of cards-card-body.

fixes.description: At a glance intro text (AbbVie Science / R&D highlights) was in its own section, separated from the cards/stats block. Attempted merge but it broke style matching.
fixes.rootCause: content - section boundary between intro text and cards block in science.plain.html
fixes.fixDetails: REVERTED: Merge broke existing styling. Restored original separate sections — intro text in its own section, cards block in next section. The separate sections are correct for the current CSS.
fixes.revertReason: Merging sections broke style match which was correct with separate sections

fixes.description: CSS 404 errors for embed and navigation-content blocks. Project loads block CSS from styles/abbvie/blocks/ path but embed.css and navigation-content.css only existed at blocks/ path.
fixes.rootCause: missing CSS files at styles/abbvie/blocks/ path
fixes.fixDetails: Copied blocks/embed/embed.css to styles/abbvie/blocks/embed/embed.css and blocks/navigation-content/navigation-content.css to styles/abbvie/blocks/navigation-content/navigation-content.css.
fixes.description: Eleni Lagkadinou profile page has bio content (image + text) embedded inside .container.overlap-predecessor using .grid-row > .grid-row__col-with-* layout, instead of a separate .grid.aem-GridColumn element. The hero-profile parser only extracted h1+subtitle, missing the bio columns entirely.
fixes.rootCause: parser
fixes.fixDetails: Updated hero-profile.js to detect embedded .grid-row inside the overlap-predecessor container. When found, it extracts the grid columns as a separate columns block appended after the hero block. Also applies image alt text fix (Rule 5) to the embedded columns.

fixes.description: Zero-width space characters (U+200B) in source CMS content caused invisible artifacts in imported text. Philip Hajduk subtitle had 'Vice Pre​sident' and 'R​&D', Shuhong Zhang bio had a trailing zero-width space.
fixes.rootCause: source content
fixes.fixDetails: Added step 10 to abbvie-cleanup.js beforeTransform: walks all text nodes and strips zero-width characters (U+200B, U+200C, U+200D, U+FEFF) using TreeWalker.

fixes.description: Breadcrumb block missing from hero section. The cleanup transformer removed breadcrumb DOM before parsers could extract config. Hero.js decoration expects a breadcrumb block in the same section to absorb.
fixes.rootCause: parser + transformer
fixes.fixDetails: 1) Updated abbvie-cleanup.js to stash breadcrumb homePagePath and homeTitle as data attributes on .overlap-predecessor before removing breadcrumb DOM. 2) Added buildBreadcrumbBlock() to hero-profile.js that reads stashed config and emits a Breadcrumb block (8 rows matching the model: id, customClass, homePagePath, homeTitle, enableBreadcrumb, enableHiddenItems, enableCurrentPage, enableRedirectTitle). 3) Breadcrumb block is prepended before the hero block in the output so hero.js can absorb it during decoration.

fixes.description: AEM package install failed with SAXParseException: 'The reference to entity dpr must end with the ; delimiter.' Scene7 image URLs contain query parameters (?ts=...&dpr=off) where the & character, decoded from & during md2jcr conversion, is not re-escaped as & in JCR Vault .content.xml serialization.
fixes.rootCause: transformer
fixes.fixDetails: Added step 11 to abbvie-cleanup.js beforeTransform: strips query parameters from all Scene7 image URLs (img[src*='scene7.com']). The ts (cache buster) and dpr (device pixel ratio) parameters are Scene7 rendering hints not needed for the image to render. Base URLs serve identically without them.
